name: home-assistant
description: Control and monitor a Home Assistant instance using natural language through Claude Code.

home_assistant_url.title: Home Assistant URL
home_assistant_url.description: Your Home Assistant instance URL (e.g., http://homeassistant.local:8123)

home_assistant_token.title: Home Assistant Token
home_assistant_token.description: Long-lived access token (Profile > Security > Long-Lived Access Tokens)
